useDebounce.description: Debounced state value. Updates after delay ms of inactivity.

useThrottle.description: Throttled state value. Updates at most once per delay ms.

useClipboard.description: Copy to clipboard with auto-reset. Returns { copied, copy }.

useTemporaryState.description: State that auto-resets to initialValue after duration ms. Returns [value, set].

useWindowEvent.description: window.addEventListener with automatic cleanup on unmount.

useLazyModule.description: Dynamic import with loading state. Returns [module, loading, error].

useSearchParams.description: Read/write URL search params via history.replaceState. Returns [URLSearchParams, setter].

useSplitPane.description: Pointer-drag resizable split pane. Attach returned ref to container element.

useClickAway.description: Fires handler when click/touch occurs outside returned ref element.

useInterval.description: setInterval with cleanup. Pass null to delay to pause.

useGeolocation.description: Device position watcher. Returns { loading, error, coords }.

useTree.description: Tree node expansion state. Returns { expanded, isExpanded, toggle, expand, collapse, expandAll, collapseAll }.
